visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
Please note: Hong Kong SAR passport holders
                                                            do not need to apply for a visa to travel to Singapore. 
Other foreign nationalities can click here (https://www.ica.gov.sg/) to check if they require
                                                            a visa to travel to Singapore. 
- Tourism
- Business
visa_types.full_text:
Please note: Hong Kong SAR passport holders
                                                            do not need to apply for a visa to travel to Singapore. 
Other foreign nationalities can click here (https://www.ica.gov.sg/) to check if they require
                                                            a visa to travel to Singapore. 
- Tourism
- Business

visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
Please produce the following documents in support of your application. Additional documents may be required when necessary.
- Passport:
 
Original passport and a photocopy of the applicant’s passport bio-data page must be furnished. At least 6 months’ validity (calculated from the date of arrival in Singapore).
- Form 14A:
 
One set (Original) of duly completed form (in English) and signed by the applicant in person per application.

- Passport-sized coloured photograph:
- taken within the last 3 months
- sized 35mm wide by 45mm high without border
- coloured, must be taken against a white background
- taken full face without headgear (unless headgear worn in accordance with his/her religious or racial custom, but the headgear must not hide the applicant’s features).
- PRC ID card, HK ID card, HK visa and Permit to Travel:
 
Original and a photocopy of the HK ID card, PRC ID card HK VISA and permit to travel between Hong Kong and China or Macau, if any.
- Documents for Employed Applicant:
 
If applicant is employed, an original letter from the employer stating applicant’s particular, the duration of employment, the designation, salary and the granting leave of absence is required. The letter must be stamped with the official stamp of the company and signed by relevant personnel.
- Documents for Unemployed Applicant:
 
If applicant is unemployed, he/she must produce the bank certificate/statement issued within 1 month of the visa application to reflect his/her actual economic capability. Other documents proving their economic capabilities may also be accepted. For applicants providing their family member’s bank certificate/statement/company letter, he/she must provide the copy of marriage certificate or birth certificate for relationship proof.
- Student Certificate (If student):
 
Original letter from the school (stamp with school’s official stamp, and signed by relevant personnel), or original of the applicant’s student card.

Important Notice

The Singapore Consulate-General and AVAs reserves the right not to process the application if any of the documents above are not submitted. Incomplete forms and/or documents submitted may result in the application being rejected or the processing delayed.Please note that each application for a visa will be considered on its own merits. A Singapore visa is not an immigration pass. It is a pre-entry permission for the holder of a valid Singapore visa to travel to, and seek entry, into Singapore. The grant of an immigration pass will be determined by the Immigration and Checkpoints Authority (ICA) officers at the point of entry. Possession of a valid visa does not guarantee entry into Singapore.
visa_types.visa_fees:
For visa applications submitted through the Visa Application Centre there will be charges of:
174 HKD (Visa Application fee)
206 HKD (Service Charge)
Total : 380 HKD / application by cash or card
Our service for Singapore visa application would not guarantee issuance of a visa, and we will not bear full responsibility for the outcome. Please note that visa application fee and other service fees are non-refundable. Grant of visa or visa processing time is decided by ICA, Immigration and Checkpoints Authority Singapore. Thank you for your cooperation and understanding.
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time is 5 to 10 working days. Please note that some applications may take longer to process.
Important: It may take longer to be approved due to circumstances. The Consulate General of the Republic of Singapore in Hong Kong recommends you to apply within 30 days of your departure. Thank you for your understanding.
visa_types.forms:
Form 14A- Signature must be the same as shown on passport.
Form V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2CLStkdruht5v9FZndr7Z5/a2c1cd2171e95b049b0e5af42d0858b3/form-V39A-2.pdf) - Letter of Introduction for Visa Application. PDF is acceptable.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## 
Visa application is required for citizens / passport holders of the following countries:
Democratic People's Republic of Korea, India, Holders of Hong Kong Document of Identity, Macau Special Administrative Region (MSAR) Travel Permit, Georgia, Turkmenistan, Ukraine and Commonwealth of Independent States (Armenia, Azerbaijan, Belarus, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Moldova, Russia, Tajikistan, Uzbekistan) (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart/entering-singapore/visa_requirements)
Afghanistan, Algeria, Bangladesh, Egypt, Iran, Iraq, Kosovo, Lebanon, Libya, Mali, Morocco, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sudan, Syria, Tunisia, Yemen, and holders of Palestinian Authority Passport, Temporary Passport issued by the United Arab Emirates and Refugee Travel Document issued by Middle-East countries (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart/entering-singapore/visa_requirements)
All foreign nationalities can click here (https://www.ica.gov.sg/) to check if they require a visa to travel to Singapore.

## Visa Fees
For visa applications submitted through the Visa Application Centre there will be charges of:
174 HKD (Visa Application fee)
206 HKD (Service Charge)
Total : 380 HKD / application by cash or card
Our service for Singapore visa application would not guarantee issuance of a visa, and we will not bear full responsibility for the outcome. Please note that visa application fee and other service fees are non-refundable. Grant of visa or visa processing time is decided by ICA, Immigration and Checkpoints Authority Singapore. Thank you for your cooperation and understanding.

## Documents Required
Please produce the following documents in support of your application. Additional documents may be required when necessary.
- Passport:
 
Original passport and a photocopy of the applicant’s passport bio-data page must be furnished. At least 6 months’ validity (calculated from the date of arrival in Singapore).
- Form 14A:
 
One set (Original) of duly completed form (in English) and signed by the applicant in person per application.

- Passport-sized coloured photograph:
- taken within the last 3 months
- sized 35mm wide by 45mm high without border
- coloured, must be taken against a white background
- taken full face without headgear (unless headgear worn in accordance with his/her religious or racial custom, but the headgear must not hide the applicant’s features).
- PRC ID card, HK ID card, HK visa and Permit to Travel:
 
Original and a photocopy of the HK ID card, PRC ID card HK VISA and permit to travel between Hong Kong and China or Macau, if any.
- Documents for Employed Applicant:
 
If applicant is employed, an original letter from the employer stating applicant’s particular, the duration of employment, the designation, salary and the granting leave of absence is required. The letter must be stamped with the official stamp of the company and signed by relevant personnel.
- Documents for Unemployed Applicant:
 
If applicant is unemployed, he/she must produce the bank certificate/statement issued within 1 month of the visa application to reflect his/her actual economic capability. Other documents proving their economic capabilities may also be accepted. For applicants providing their family member’s bank certificate/statement/company letter, he/she must provide the copy of marriage certificate or birth certificate for relationship proof.
- Student Certificate (If student):
 
Original letter from the school (stamp with school’s official stamp, and signed by relevant personnel), or original of the applicant’s student card.

Important Notice

The Singapore Consulate-General and AVAs reserves the right not to process the application if any of the documents above are not submitted. Incomplete forms and/or documents submitted may result in the application being rejected or the processing delayed.Please note that each application for a visa will be considered on its own merits. A Singapore visa is not an immigration pass. It is a pre-entry permission for the holder of a valid Singapore visa to travel to, and seek entry, into Singapore. The grant of an immigration pass will be determined by the Immigration and Checkpoints Authority (ICA) officers at the point of entry. Possession of a valid visa does not guarantee entry into Singapore.

                                                                            

## Photo Specifications
One recent passport-sized color photograph which meets the following requirements:
- Photo size should be 3.5cm×4.5cm
- The facial image should be between 3cm and 3.5cm
- Image must be taken within the last 3 months
- Photograph should be in color, must be taken against a white background with a matt or semi-matt finish
- Image must show the full face and without headgear (headgear worn in accordance with religious or racial customs is acceptable but must not hide the facial features)
- Please write your name-same as passport- back of your photo and stick it on ApplicationForm14A before you hand it
- Photo size should be 3.5cm×4.5cm
- The facial image should be between 3cm and 3.5cm
- Image must be taken within the last 3 months
- Photograph should be in color, must be taken against a white background with a matt or semi-matt finish
- Image must show the full face and without headgear (headgear worn in accordance with religious or racial customs is acceptable but must not hide the facial features)
- Please write your name-same as passport- back of your photo and stick it on ApplicationForm14A before you hand it.

## Processing Time
Processing time is 5 to 10 working days. Please note that some applications may take longer to process.
Important: It may take longer to be approved due to circumstances. The Consulate General of the Republic of Singapore in Hong Kong recommends you to apply within 30 days of your departure. Thank you for your understanding.

## Download Forms
Form 14A- Signature must be the same as shown on passport.
Form V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2CLStkdruht5v9FZndr7Z5/a2c1cd2171e95b049b0e5af42d0858b3/form-V39A-2.pdf) - Letter of Introduction for Visa Application. PDF is acceptable.

visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
Please produce the following documents in support of your application. Additional documents may be required when necessary.
- Passport:
 
Original passport and a photocopy of the applicant’s passport bio-data page must be furnished. At least 6 months’ validity (calculated from the date of arrival in Singapore).
- Form 14A:
 
One set (Original) of duly completed form (in English) and signed by the applicant in person per application.
- Passport-sized coloured photograph: One set of photograph must meet the following requirements :
- Taken within the last 3 months;
- Coloured, must be taken against a white background with a matt of semi-matt finish; and
- Taken full face without headgear (unless headgear worn in accordance with his/her religious or racial custom, but the headgear must not hide the applicant’s features).
- PRC, HK Identity Card and Permit to Travel:
 
Original and a photocopy of HKID, HK VISA and permit to travel between Hong Kong and China or Macau, if any.
- Business Profile:
 
Computer printout of the Singapore registered company’s business profile (showing the names of all the directors/shareholders) obtainable from Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority and printed within the last 3 months. Applicants who are invited by Singapore government agencies, universities or are attending exhibition/conference/convention in Singapore are not required producing business profile. However, they need to present the original invitation letter by the inviting organization or event organizer addressed to the applicant. The invitation letter must be signed by the invitee of the organizer and addressed to the applicant (the full name as in passport).
- Employment Letter:
 
Original company letter issued by applicant’s current employer stating the designation, purpose and date of visit to Singapore.
- Other Requirements:
 
The applicant may be required to furnish additional documents and information whenever necessary requested by the Singapore Consulate-General or our AVAs. Official translations of the documents are required if they are not in the English language.
Important Notice
The Singapore Consulate-General and AVAs reserves the right not to process the application if any of the documents above are not submitted. Incomplete forms and/or documents submitted may result in the application being rejected or the processing delayed.

Please note that visa application fee and other service fees are non-refundable. Grant of visa or visa processing time is decided by ICA, Immigration and Checkpoints Authority Singapore. Thank you for your cooperation and understanding.
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time is 5 to 10 working days. Please note that some applications may take longer to process.
Important: It may take longer to be approved due to circumstances. The Consulate General of the Republic of Singapore in Hong Kong recommends you to apply within 30 days of your departure. Thank you for your understanding.

Form V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2CLStkdruht5v9FZndr7Z5/a2c1cd2171e95b049b0e5af42d0858b3/form-V39A-2.pdf) - Letter of Introduction for Visa Application. PDF is acceptable.
